v2Migration.title: V2 Migration to cropsintel.com
v2Migration.description: V2 is LIVE at cropsintel.com. DNS cutover complete. Remaining: deploy edge function + V1 user data extraction.
v2Migration.actionRequired: Deploy whatsapp-login edge function via Lovable, then extract V1 user data. Migration guide at V1-to-V2-User-Migration-Guide.md.

items.name: V2 app live at cropsintel.com
65 V1 users migrated to V2 Supabase
4-method login system (WhatsApp+Pass, WhatsApp OTP, Email+Pass, Email OTP)
whatsapp-login edge function with V1 auto-migration logic
Profile completion banner for missing data
Forgot Password flow + ResetPassword page
Supabase email templates branded (Reset, Magic Link, Confirm)
Supabase redirect URLs configured for cropsintel.net + .com
Forgot password tested live
Deploy whatsapp-login edge function to Supabase via Lovable
items.note: Prompt ready in Migration Guide Step 2

items.name: Settings: profile editing + change password + admin controls
SetPassword page for V1 migrated users
Admin Add/Delete user controls in Settings
Change Password form in Settings
iOS TestFlight pointing to V2
cropsintel.com DNS pointed to V2 (GitHub Pages)
GitHub Pages CNAME + HTTPS configured
Verify admin login on cropsintel.com
Verify WhatsApp OTP login end-to-end
Verify email+password login for migrated users
Test guest → register → verify flow
V1 app (Lovable) redirect to V2
Send V2 upgrade notification to 65 users
Extract V1 user data and ingest into V2
items.note: Prompt ready in Migration Guide Step 1

milestones.text: cropsintel.com DNS cutover COMPLETE — V2 is live at production domain
SetPassword page + Change Password form + Admin Add/Delete users
V1 auto-migration edge function code: creates auth accounts for V1 users on WhatsApp OTP login
AUTH OVERNIGHT: Forgot Password + ResetPassword + 3 branded email templates + redirect URLs
4-method login system: WhatsApp+Pass, WhatsApp OTP, Email+Pass, Email Magic Link
65 V1 users migrated to V2 Supabase with full profiles
Settings page: profile editing + change password + admin user management
CRM: contact detail panel, invitation system, bulk invites, activity notes
Trading Portal: offer builder + Supabase + CRM contacts + WhatsApp delivery
Role-based access control: ProtectedRoute, admin user mgmt, route gating
iOS build #39 green — uploaded to TestFlight
WhatsApp LIVE: 4 edge functions deployed, Twilio webhook configured
Cmd+K command palette + OG meta tags + CSV exports
Cinematic 10-slide tour on Welcome page
SOFT LAUNCH GATE REACHED — Phases 1-4 complete
CRM Phase 4: 15 issues + 12 AI enhancements shipped
Dashboard perf: 30s → 2-3s load
iOS app uploaded to TestFlight
Data integrity audit: 114 PDFs, 116 rows clean
Pre-launch signoff: R1-R3 gates passed
Phase 3 AI Systems complete — all 4 edge functions live
Phase 2 Stabilization — 30+ steps done
72 real ABC PDFs scraped, DB rebuilt
